name: Iron Ore Suppliers (India Domestic + Imports)
description: Aggregate representation of iron ore miners supplying Indian steel producers. Mix of domestic (NMDC, Tata Steel captive) and imported (Australia, Brazil) sources.
objectives: Maximize margin per ton while maintaining long-term customer relationships
Secure long-term offtake agreements to justify capacity expansion investment
Maintain supply discipline to prevent price collapse from oversupply
Diversify customer base beyond Indian steel producers to global markets
constraints: 60% of volume committed under long-term contracts with fixed pricing formulas
Export restrictions and duties limit ability to sell to higher-priced international markets
Environmental clearances constrain production capacity expansion
Transportation infrastructure bottlenecks limit delivery flexibility
